goal: 继续继承旧产品代码块消息 UX

summary.title: 迁移旧产品代码块消息 UX
summary.what: 在 vNext sidepanel 的 assistant rich text 渲染中补回旧产品 IncremarkCodeBlock 风格代码块：fenced code 会渲染为 .incremark-code 外壳，包含语言栏、复制代码按钮和深色代码区域；ChatTranscriptPane 通过事件委托发出 copyCode；App 复用现有 clipboard backing 并显示“已复制代码”提示。
summary.why: 用户要求 UI/UX 直接继承旧产品而不是自创新壳。旧产品 ChatMessage 通过 IncremarkContent/IncremarkCodeBlock 展示代码块，新项目此前只有裸 pre/code，缺少旧产品代码块 shell 和复制入口。
summary.user_goal: 继续继承旧产品代码块消息 UX

decisions.point: 代码块 UX 继承范围
decisions.chose: 只迁移旧产品代码块消息 shell、语言显示和复制代码入口
decisions.rationale: 这是聊天主路径可见 UX，且 vNext 已有 clipboard backing，可以做到真实可用而不是假按钮。
rejected: 不迁移旧产品 Shiki 编辑器或语法高亮依赖，因为当前目标是消息展示和复制 UX，避免新增重依赖和不必要运行时复杂度。

decisions.chose: renderer 返回 codeBlocks 元数据，ChatTranscriptPane 用 data-code-copy 事件委托定位代码块，再由 App 写入剪贴板
decisions.rationale: innerHTML 负责渲染旧产品式结构，代码内容复制仍走结构化元数据，避免从 DOM 文本反解析。

decisions.chose: 把 ts/js/py/sh 等常见 fence alias 归一为 typescript/javascript/python/shell 等显示值
decisions.rationale: 旧产品代码块会展示语言栏；归一化后 UI 更接近产品语义，也便于测试和后续高亮接入。

rejected.alternative: 继续保留裸 pre/code 渲染
rejected.reason: 不符合旧产品 UI/UX 继承要求，且没有用户可用的代码复制入口。

rejected.alternative: 新增没有 backing 的复制按钮或 runtime route
rejected.reason: 复制可以直接复用现有 clipboard backing，不需要新增 runtime protocol，也不能展示不可用按钮。

review_notes: 本 intent 的实际新增提交是 988143d feat(mv3-shell): 迁移代码块消息 UX；seal prepare 的 files_touched 还包含同一 stacked branch 上前序旧产品 sidepanel UX 迁移文件。
Preflight overlap 已分类为同一旧产品 sidepanel 壳的连续互补迁移，不是语义冲突；本次未改输入区、会话历史、空状态、顶部栏、扩展身份或 runtime chat protocol。

验证已完成：bun test apps/mv3-shell/test/sidepanel-app.spec.ts 24 pass；聚焦 Biome 通过；git diff --check 通过；bun run typecheck 通过；bun run build 通过；Playwright HTTP 加载最新 dist 通过；bun run check 39 files / 662 tests pass。
Playwright 验证覆盖 .incremark-code .code-btn 可见、language=typescript、点击复制 const answer = 42;、toast=已复制代码、无横向 overflow、无 console/page error/request failure。

architectural_claims: sidepanel assistant rich text renderer owns message markdown/code rendering
ChatTranscriptPane keeps rendered HTML interactions bridged through typed emitted events instead of parsing DOM text for clipboard content
behavioral_changes: Assistant fenced code blocks render with old-product .incremark-code shell, header, language label, copy button, and code content area.
Clicking the code block copy button copies only the fenced code content and shows the conversation notice 已复制代码.
Plain and inline markdown render paths now include an empty codeBlocks array to keep the render result shape stable.

api_changes.signature: ChatTranscriptPane emits copyCode({ code: string, language: string, messageId: string })
renderMessageRichText(text): RichTextRenderResult now includes codeBlocks: CodeBlockRenderResult[]

data_model_changes.name: RichTextRenderResult.codeBlocks
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Internal in-memory render metadata only; no persisted state migration.

security_implications: Code block content continues to be HTML-escaped before insertion through innerHTML.
Copy action uses structured renderer metadata and existing clipboard helper; no new extension permission or remote execution surface was added.
migration_notes: This is part of the old-product sidepanel UI/UX inheritance stream and intentionally mirrors ChatMessage/IncremarkCodeBlock behavior without importing the old Shiki editor stack.
Stacked branch fingerprint includes previous sidepanel identity/history/header/input/message UX migration files; current semantic delta is code block message UX.
